params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, Winback_Pilot__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsWon = true AND dateTimestampContractreceived__c = THIS_QUARTER AND RecordType.Name = 'Customer Self Service' AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY OwnerId LIMIT 2000
